title: edit: (a)	What incentives actually have a significant impact on patients’ intention toward the continued use of digital …

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: edit: (a)	What incentives actually have a significant impact on patients’ intention toward the continued use of digital therapeutics?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: What are the incentives that significantly influence patients' intentions to continue using digital therapeutics?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: edit: Therefore, the research project aims to investigate the factors influencing users' intention to continuously use digital therapeutics through a cross-country vignette study in Canada and Germany with a significant cultural distance in terms of long-term orientation.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Therefore, this research project seeks to examine the factors that affect users' willingness to persist in using digital therapeutics through a cross-country vignette study conducted in Canada and Germany. The study will focus on identifying the cultural differences between the two countries, particularly in terms of their long-term orientation, that may impact users' attitudes towards digital therapeutics.
